query:
SELECT
                p.id,
                p.activity,
                p.start_time as "start_time: jiff_sqlx::Timestamp",

                COALESCE(
                    (SELECT array_agg(f.user_id) FROM lfg_fireteam f WHERE f.post_id = p.id),
                    '{}'
                ) AS "fireteam!"

            FROM
                lfg_posts p
            JOIN lfg_fireteam f ON p.id = f.post_id
            WHERE
                f.user_id = $1
